javascript:(()%3D%3E%7B%22use%20strict%22%3Bconst%20i%3D%22permreg-panel%22%2CP%3D%22permreg.webUrl%22%2Cw%3D%22%5Cu7D44%5Cu7E54%5Cu533A%5Cu5206%5Cu7B2C1%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%5Cu30DE%5Cu30B9%5Cu30BF%22%2Cp%3D%22%5Cu7D44%5Cu7E54%5Cu533A%5Cu5206%5Cu7B2C2%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%5Cu30DE%5Cu30B9%5Cu30BF%22%2Cj%3Ddocument.getElementById(i)%3Bj%26%26j.remove()%3Bconst%20r%3D%7BwebUrl%3A%22%22%2Cl1%3A%5B%5D%2Cl2%3A%5B%5D%2CselectedL1%3Anull%2Cready%3A!1%2Cbusy%3A!1%7D%3Bfunction%20q()%7Btry%7Bif(window._spPageContextInfo%26%26window._spPageContextInfo.webAbsoluteUrl)return%20window._spPageContextInfo.webAbsoluteUrl%7Dcatch%7B%7Dconst%20e%3Dlocation.href.match(%2F%5E(https%3A%5C%2F%5C%2F%5B%5E%2F%5D%2B(%3F%3A%5C%2F(%3F%3Asites%7Cteams)%5C%2F%5B%5E%2F%5D%2B)%3F)%2F)%3Breturn%20e%3Fe%5B1%5D%3Alocation.origin%7Dr.webUrl%3DlocalStorage.getItem(P)%7C%7Cq()%3Bconst%20D%3D()%3D%3Er.webUrl.replace(%2F%5C%2F%2B%24%2F%2C%22%22)%3Blet%20v%3Dnull%3Basync%20function%20z()%7Bif(v%26%26Date.now()%3Cv.exp)return%20v.value%3Bconst%20e%3Dawait%20fetch(D()%2B%22%2F_api%2Fcontextinfo%22%2C%7Bmethod%3A%22POST%22%2Cheaders%3A%7BAccept%3A%22application%2Fjson%3Bodata%3Dnometadata%22%7D%2Ccredentials%3A%22same-origin%22%7D)%3Bif(!e.ok)throw%20new%20Error(%22contextinfo%20%5Cu306E%5Cu53D6%5Cu5F97%5Cu306B%5Cu5931%5Cu6557%20(HTTP%20%22%2Be.status%2B%22)%5Cu3002%5Cu30B5%5Cu30A4%5Cu30C8URL%5Cu3092%5Cu78BA%5Cu8A8D%5Cu3057%5Cu3066%5Cu304F%5Cu3060%5Cu3055%5Cu3044%5Cu3002%22)%3Bconst%20t%3Dawait%20e.json()%3Breturn%20v%3D%7Bvalue%3At.FormDigestValue%2Cexp%3ADate.now()%2BMath.max(60%2C(t.FormDigestTimeoutSeconds%7C%7C1800)-60)*1e3%7D%2Cv.value%7Dasync%20function%20I(e%2Ct%2Ca%2Cd)%7Bconst%20o%3DObject.assign(%7BAccept%3A%22application%2Fjson%3Bodata%3Dnometadata%22%7D%2Cd)%3Be!%3D%3D%22GET%22%26%26(o%5B%22X-RequestDigest%22%5D%3Dawait%20z()%2Ca!%3Dnull%26%26(o%5B%22Content-Type%22%5D%3D%22application%2Fjson%3Bodata%3Dnometadata%22))%3Bconst%20s%3Dawait%20fetch(D()%2Bt%2C%7Bmethod%3Ae%3D%3D%3D%22GET%22%3F%22GET%22%3A%22POST%22%2Cheaders%3Ao%2Ccredentials%3A%22same-origin%22%2Cbody%3Aa!%3Dnull%3FJSON.stringify(a)%3Avoid%200%7D)%3Bif(!s.ok)%7Blet%20x%3D%22HTTP%20%22%2Bs.status%3Btry%7Bconst%20n%3Dawait%20s.json()%2Cl%3Dn%5B%22odata.error%22%5D%26%26n%5B%22odata.error%22%5D.message%26%26n%5B%22odata.error%22%5D.message.value%7C%7Cn.error%26%26n.error.message%26%26(n.error.message.value%7C%7Cn.error.message)%3Bl%26%26(x%2B%3D%22%20%5Cu2014%20%22%2Bl)%7Dcatch%7B%7Dconst%20f%3Dnew%20Error(x)%3Bthrow%20f.status%3Ds.status%2Cf%7Dconst%20b%3Dawait%20s.text()%3Breturn%20b%3FJSON.parse(b)%3Anull%7Dconst%20S%3De%3D%3EI(%22GET%22%2Ce)%2C%24%3D(e%2Ct)%3D%3EI(%22POST%22%2Ce%2Ct)%2CE%3D(e%2Ct)%3D%3EI(%22POST%22%2Ce%2Ct%2C%7B%22X-HTTP-Method%22%3A%22MERGE%22%2C%22IF-MATCH%22%3A%22*%22%7D)%2CC%3De%3D%3EI(%22POST%22%2Ce%2Cnull%2C%7B%22X-HTTP-Method%22%3A%22DELETE%22%2C%22IF-MATCH%22%3A%22*%22%7D)%2Cu%3De%3D%3E%22%2F_api%2Fweb%2Flists%2Fgetbytitle('%22%2BencodeURIComponent(e.replace(%2F'%2Fg%2C%22''%22))%2B%22')%22%3Basync%20function%20A(e)%7Btry%7Breturn(await%20S(u(e)%2B%22%3F%24select%3DId%22)).Id%7Dcatch(t)%7Bif(t.status%3D%3D%3D404)return%20null%3Bthrow%20t%7D%7Dasync%20function%20F(e%2Ct)%7Bconst%20a%3Dawait%20A(e)%3Breturn%20a%7C%7C(await%20%24(%22%2F_api%2Fweb%2Flists%22%2C%7BTitle%3Ae%2CBaseTemplate%3A100%2CDescription%3At%7D)).Id%7Dasync%20function%20_(e%2Ct)%7Btry%7Breturn%20await%20S(u(e)%2B%22%2Ffields%2Fgetbyinternalnameortitle('%22%2Bt%2B%22')%3F%24select%3DId%22)%2C!0%7Dcatch(a)%7Bif(a.status%3D%3D%3D404)return!1%3Bthrow%20a%7D%7Dasync%20function%20L(e%2Ct%2Ca%2Cd)%7Bawait%20_(e%2Ct)%7C%7C(await%20%24(u(e)%2B%22%2Ffields%22%2CObject.assign(%7BTitle%3At%7D%2Cd))%2Cawait%20E(u(e)%2B%22%2Ffields%2Fgetbyinternalnameortitle('%22%2Bt%2B%22')%22%2C%7BTitle%3Aa%7D))%7Dasync%20function%20M(e%2Ct%2Ca%2Cd)%7Bif(await%20_(e%2Ct))return%3Bconst%20o%3D%22%3CField%20Type%3D'Lookup'%20DisplayName%3D'%22%2Bt%2B%22'%20Name%3D'%22%2Bt%2B%22'%20StaticName%3D'%22%2Bt%2B%22'%20List%3D'%7B%22%2Bd%2B%22%7D'%20ShowField%3D'Title'%20Required%3D'TRUE'%2F%3E%22%3Bawait%20%24(u(e)%2B%22%2Ffields%2Fcreatefieldasxml%22%2C%7Bparameters%3A%7BSchemaXml%3Ao%7D%7D)%2Cawait%20E(u(e)%2B%22%2Ffields%2Fgetbyinternalnameortitle('%22%2Bt%2B%22')%22%2C%7BTitle%3Aa%7D)%7Dasync%20function%20H(e%2Ct)%7Bfor(const%20a%20of%20t)try%7Bawait%20%24(u(e)%2B%22%2Fdefaultview%2Fviewfields%2Faddviewfield('%22%2Ba%2B%22')%22)%7Dcatch%7B%7D%7Dasync%20function%20R(e)%7Be(%22%5Cu300C%22%2Bw%2B%22%5Cu300D%5Cu3092%5Cu78BA%5Cu8A8D%5Cu4E2D%5Cu2026%22)%3Bconst%20t%3Dawait%20F(w%2C%22%5Cu6A29%5Cu9650%5Cu767B%5Cu9332%5Cu30EA%5Cu30B9%5Cu30C8%5Cu7528%20%5Cu7D44%5Cu7E54%5Cu533A%5Cu5206(%5Cu7B2C1%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64)%5Cu30DE%5Cu30B9%5Cu30BF%22)%3Bawait%20L(w%2C%22SortOrder%22%2C%22%5Cu4E26%5Cu3073%5Cu9806%22%2C%7BFieldTypeKind%3A9%7D)%2Cawait%20L(w%2C%22Active%22%2C%22%5Cu6709%5Cu52B9%22%2C%7BFieldTypeKind%3A8%2CDefaultValue%3A%221%22%7D)%2Cawait%20H(w%2C%5B%22SortOrder%22%2C%22Active%22%5D)%2Ce(%22%5Cu300C%22%2Bp%2B%22%5Cu300D%5Cu3092%5Cu78BA%5Cu8A8D%5Cu4E2D%5Cu2026%22)%2Cawait%20F(p%2C%22%5Cu6A29%5Cu9650%5Cu767B%5Cu9332%5Cu30EA%5Cu30B9%5Cu30C8%5Cu7528%20%5Cu7D44%5Cu7E54%5Cu533A%5Cu5206(%5Cu7B2C2%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64)%5Cu30DE%5Cu30B9%5Cu30BF%22)%2Cawait%20M(p%2C%22Level1%22%2C%22%5Cu7B2C1%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%22%2Ct)%2Cawait%20L(p%2C%22SortOrder%22%2C%22%5Cu4E26%5Cu3073%5Cu9806%22%2C%7BFieldTypeKind%3A9%7D)%2Cawait%20L(p%2C%22Active%22%2C%22%5Cu6709%5Cu52B9%22%2C%7BFieldTypeKind%3A8%2CDefaultValue%3A%221%22%7D)%2Cawait%20H(p%2C%5B%22Level1%22%2C%22SortOrder%22%2C%22Active%22%5D)%2Ce(%22%5Cu30BB%5Cu30C3%5Cu30C8%5Cu30A2%5Cu30C3%5Cu30D7%5Cu5B8C%5Cu4E86%20%5Cu2713%22)%7Dasync%20function%20G()%7Br.ready%3D!!await%20A(w)%26%26!!await%20A(p)%7Dasync%20function%20K()%7Bconst%5Be%2Ct%5D%3Dawait%20Promise.all(%5BS(u(w)%2B%22%2Fitems%3F%24select%3DId%2CTitle%2CSortOrder%2CActive%26%24orderby%3DSortOrder%2CId%26%24top%3D4999%22)%2CS(u(p)%2B%22%2Fitems%3F%24select%3DId%2CTitle%2CSortOrder%2CActive%2CLevel1%2FId%26%24expand%3DLevel1%26%24orderby%3DSortOrder%2CId%26%24top%3D4999%22)%5D)%3Br.l1%3De.value%7C%7C%5B%5D%2Cr.l2%3Dt.value%7C%7C%5B%5D%2Cr.selectedL1%26%26!r.l1.some(a%3D%3Ea.Id%3D%3D%3Dr.selectedL1)%26%26(r.selectedL1%3Dnull)%2C!r.selectedL1%26%26r.l1.length%26%26(r.selectedL1%3Dr.l1%5B0%5D.Id)%7Dconst%20N%3De%3D%3Ee.reduce((t%2Ca)%3D%3EMath.max(t%2Ca.SortOrder%7C%7C0)%2C0)%2B10%3Basync%20function%20V(e%2Ct)%7Bawait%20%24(u(e)%2B%22%2Fitems%22%2Ct)%7Dasync%20function%20T(e%2Ct%2Ca)%7Bawait%20E(u(e)%2B%22%2Fitems(%22%2Bt%2B%22)%22%2Ca)%7Dasync%20function%20X(e%2Ct)%7Bawait%20C(u(e)%2B%22%2Fitems(%22%2Bt%2B%22)%22)%7Dasync%20function%20B(e%2Ct%2Ca%2Cd)%7Bconst%20o%3Dt.indexOf(a)%2Cs%3Do%2Bd%3Bif(s%3C0%7C%7Cs%3E%3Dt.length)return%3Bconst%20b%3Dt.map(l%3D%3El.SortOrder)%3Bif(b.some((l%2Ck)%3D%3El%3D%3Dnull%7C%7Cb.indexOf(l)!%3D%3Dk))for(let%20l%3D0%3Bl%3Ct.length%3Bl%2B%2B)t%5Bl%5D.SortOrder%3D(l%2B1)*10%2Cawait%20T(e%2Ct%5Bl%5D.Id%2C%7BSortOrder%3At%5Bl%5D.SortOrder%7D)%3Bconst%20f%3Dt%5Bo%5D%2Cn%3Dt%5Bs%5D%3Bawait%20T(e%2Cf.Id%2C%7BSortOrder%3An.SortOrder%7D)%2Cawait%20T(e%2Cn.Id%2C%7BSortOrder%3Af.SortOrder%7D)%7Dconst%20y%3De%3D%3EString(e%3F%3F%22%22).replace(%2F%26%2Fg%2C%22%26amp%3B%22).replace(%2F%3C%2Fg%2C%22%26lt%3B%22).replace(%2F%3E%2Fg%2C%22%26gt%3B%22).replace(%2F%22%2Fg%2C%22%26quot%3B%22)%2CJ%3D%60%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%7Bposition%3Afixed%3Btop%3A0%3Bright%3A0%3Bwidth%3A760px%3Bmax-width%3A96vw%3Bheight%3A100vh%3Bz-index%3A2147483000%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%23fff%3Bcolor%3A%23222%3Bborder-left%3A1px%20solid%20%23c8c8c8%3Bbox-shadow%3A-4px%200%2016px%20rgba(0%2C0%2C0%2C.25)%3B%0A%20%20font%3A13px%2F1.5%20%22Segoe%20UI%22%2C%22Yu%20Gothic%20UI%22%2C%22Hiragino%20Sans%22%2Csans-serif%3Bdisplay%3Aflex%3Bflex-direction%3Acolumn%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20*%7Bbox-sizing%3Aborder-box%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20header%7Bdisplay%3Aflex%3Bgap%3A8px%3Balign-items%3Acenter%3Bpadding%3A10px%2012px%3Bbackground%3A%230b5cab%3Bcolor%3A%23fff%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20header%20b%7Bfont-size%3A14px%3Bwhite-space%3Anowrap%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20header%20input%7Bflex%3A1%3Bmin-width%3A120px%3Bborder%3Anone%3Bborder-radius%3A3px%3Bpadding%3A4px%208px%3Bfont-size%3A12px%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-btn%7Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20%23aaa%3Bbackground%3A%23f5f5f5%3Bborder-radius%3A3px%3Bpadding%3A4px%2010px%3Bcursor%3Apointer%3Bfont-size%3A12px%3Bwhite-space%3Anowrap%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-btn%3Ahover%7Bbackground%3A%23e8e8e8%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-btn.pri%7Bbackground%3A%230b5cab%3Bborder-color%3A%230b5cab%3Bcolor%3A%23fff%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-btn.pri%3Ahover%7Bbackground%3A%23094d8f%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-btn.warn%7Bcolor%3A%23b00020%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-body%7Bflex%3A1%3Bdisplay%3Aflex%3Bmin-height%3A0%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-col%7Bflex%3A1%3Bdisplay%3Aflex%3Bflex-direction%3Acolumn%3Bmin-width%3A0%3Bborder-right%3A1px%20solid%20%23ddd%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-col%3Alast-child%7Bborder-right%3Anone%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-col%20h3%7Bmargin%3A0%3Bpadding%3A8px%2012px%3Bfont-size%3A13px%3Bbackground%3A%23f0f4f8%3Bborder-bottom%3A1px%20solid%20%23ddd%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-add%7Bdisplay%3Aflex%3Bgap%3A6px%3Bpadding%3A8px%2012px%3Bborder-bottom%3A1px%20solid%20%23eee%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-add%20input%7Bflex%3A1%3Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20%23bbb%3Bborder-radius%3A3px%3Bpadding%3A4px%208px%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-rows%7Bflex%3A1%3Boverflow%3Aauto%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-row%7Bdisplay%3Aflex%3Bgap%3A6px%3Balign-items%3Acenter%3Bpadding%3A6px%2012px%3Bborder-bottom%3A1px%20solid%20%23f0f0f0%3Bcursor%3Adefault%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-row.sel%7Bbackground%3A%23e7f1fb%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-row%20.nm%7Bflex%3A1%3Bmin-width%3A0%3Boverflow%3Ahidden%3Btext-overflow%3Aellipsis%3Bwhite-space%3Anowrap%3Bcursor%3Apointer%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-row%20.nm%20.cnt%7Bcolor%3A%23888%3Bfont-size%3A11px%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-row.off%20.nm%7Bcolor%3A%23aaa%3Btext-decoration%3Aline-through%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-mini%7Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20%23ccc%3Bbackground%3A%23fafafa%3Bborder-radius%3A3px%3Bwidth%3A24px%3Bheight%3A22px%3Bcursor%3Apointer%3Bfont-size%3A11px%3Bline-height%3A1%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-mini%3Ahover%7Bbackground%3A%23eee%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20footer%7Bpadding%3A6px%2012px%3Bborder-top%3A1px%20solid%20%23ddd%3Bbackground%3A%23fafafa%3Bcolor%3A%23555%3Bfont-size%3A12px%3B%0A%20%20white-space%3Anowrap%3Boverflow%3Ahidden%3Btext-overflow%3Aellipsis%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-setup%7Bpadding%3A24px%3Btext-align%3Acenter%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-setup%20p%7Bcolor%3A%23555%7D%0A%23%24%7Bi%7D%20.pr-busy%7Bopacity%3A.5%3Bpointer-events%3Anone%7D%0A%60%2Cc%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bc.id%3Di%2Cdocument.body.appendChild(c)%3Bfunction%20O(e)%7Bconst%20t%3Dc.querySelector(%22footer%22)%3Bt%26%26(t.textContent%3De)%7Dasync%20function%20g(e%2Ct)%7Bif(!r.busy)%7Br.busy%3D!0%2Cc.querySelector(%22.pr-body%22).classList.add(%22pr-busy%22)%2CO(e%2B%22%5Cu2026%22)%3Btry%7Bawait%20t()%2CO(e%2B%22%20%5Cu5B8C%5Cu4E86%22)%7Dcatch(a)%7BO(%22%5Cu30A8%5Cu30E9%5Cu30FC%3A%20%22%2Ba.message)%2Calert(%60permreg%20%5Cu30A8%5Cu30E9%5Cu30FC%3A%0A%60%2Ba.message)%7Dfinally%7Br.busy%3D!1%3Bconst%20a%3Dc.querySelector(%22.pr-body%22)%3Ba%26%26a.classList.remove(%22pr-busy%22)%7D%7D%7Dfunction%20U()%7Bconst%20e%3Dd%3D%3Er.l2.filter(o%3D%3Eo.Level1%26%26o.Level1.Id%3D%3D%3Dd)%2Ct%3Dr.l1.find(d%3D%3Ed.Id%3D%3D%3Dr.selectedL1)%3Blet%20a%3Bif(!r.ready)a%3D%60%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-setup%22%20style%3D%22flex%3A1%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cp%3E%5Cu30DE%5Cu30B9%5Cu30BF%5Cu30EA%5Cu30B9%5Cu30C8%5Cu304C%5Cu307E%5Cu3060%5Cu3042%5Cu308A%5Cu307E%5Cu305B%5Cu3093%5Cu3002%3Cbr%3E%5Cu3053%5Cu306E%5Cu30B5%5Cu30A4%5Cu30C8%5Cu306B%5Cu300C%24%7By(w)%7D%5Cu300D%5Cu300C%24%7By(p)%7D%5Cu300D%5Cu3092%5Cu4F5C%5Cu6210%5Cu3057%5Cu307E%5Cu3059%5Cu3002%3C%2Fp%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cbutton%20class%3D%22pr-btn%20pri%22%20data-act%3D%22setup%22%3E%5Cu521D%5Cu671F%5Cu30BB%5Cu30C3%5Cu30C8%5Cu30A2%5Cu30C3%5Cu30D7(%5Cu30EA%5Cu30B9%5Cu30C8%5Cu4F5C%5Cu6210)%3C%2Fbutton%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%60%3Belse%7Bconst%20d%3D(o%2Cs%2Cb)%3D%3E%60%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-row%24%7Bo.Active%3D%3D%3D!1%3F%22%20off%22%3A%22%22%7D%24%7Bb%7C%7C%22%22%7D%22%20data-kind%3D%22%24%7Bs%7D%22%20data-id%3D%22%24%7Bo.Id%7D%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cbutton%20class%3D%22pr-mini%22%20data-act%3D%22up%22%20title%3D%22%5Cu4E0A%5Cu3078%22%3E%5Cu25B2%3C%2Fbutton%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cbutton%20class%3D%22pr-mini%22%20data-act%3D%22down%22%20title%3D%22%5Cu4E0B%5Cu3078%22%3E%5Cu25BC%3C%2Fbutton%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cspan%20class%3D%22nm%22%20data-act%3D%22%24%7Bs%3D%3D%3D%22l1%22%3F%22select%22%3A%22%22%7D%22%20title%3D%22%24%7By(o.Title)%7D%22%3E%24%7By(o.Title)%7D%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%24%7Bs%3D%3D%3D%22l1%22%3F%60%3Cspan%20class%3D%22cnt%22%3E(%24%7Be(o.Id).length%7D)%3C%2Fspan%3E%60%3A%22%22%7D%3C%2Fspan%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Clabel%20title%3D%22%5Cu6709%5Cu52B9%2F%5Cu7121%5Cu52B9%22%3E%3Cinput%20type%3D%22checkbox%22%20data-act%3D%22active%22%20%24%7Bo.Active!%3D%3D!1%3F%22checked%22%3A%22%22%7D%3E%3C%2Flabel%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cbutton%20class%3D%22pr-mini%22%20data-act%3D%22rename%22%20title%3D%22%5Cu540D%5Cu79F0%5Cu5909%5Cu66F4%22%3E%5Cu270F%3C%2Fbutton%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cbutton%20class%3D%22pr-mini%20warn%22%20data-act%3D%22del%22%20title%3D%22%5Cu524A%5Cu9664%22%3E%5Cu%7B1F5D1%7D%3C%2Fbutton%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%60%3Ba%3D%60%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-col%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Ch3%3E%5Cu7B2C1%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%20(%24%7Br.l1.length%7D%5Cu4EF6)%3C%2Fh3%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-add%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cinput%20type%3D%22text%22%20id%3D%22pr-add-l1%22%20placeholder%3D%22%5Cu7B2C1%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%5Cu306E%5Cu540D%5Cu79F0%5Cu3092%5Cu5165%5Cu529B%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cbutton%20class%3D%22pr-btn%20pri%22%20data-act%3D%22add-l1%22%3E%5Cu8FFD%5Cu52A0%3C%2Fbutton%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-rows%22%3E%24%7Br.l1.map(o%3D%3Ed(o%2C%22l1%22%2Co.Id%3D%3D%3Dr.selectedL1%3F%22%20sel%22%3A%22%22)).join(%22%22)%7C%7C'%3Cdiv%20style%3D%22padding%3A16px%3Bcolor%3A%23888%22%3E%5Cu672A%5Cu767B%5Cu9332%3C%2Fdiv%3E'%7D%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-col%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Ch3%3E%5Cu7B2C2%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%20%24%7Bt%3F%22%5Cu2014%20%22%2By(t.Title)%2B%22%20(%22%2Be(t.Id).length%2B%22%5Cu4EF6)%22%3A%22%22%7D%3C%2Fh3%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%24%7Bt%3F%60%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-add%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cinput%20type%3D%22text%22%20id%3D%22pr-add-l2%22%20placeholder%3D%22%5Cu300C%24%7By(t.Title)%7D%5Cu300D%5Cu914D%5Cu4E0B%5Cu306E%5Cu540D%5Cu79F0%5Cu3092%5Cu5165%5Cu529B%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cbutton%20class%3D%22pr-btn%20pri%22%20data-act%3D%22add-l2%22%3E%5Cu8FFD%5Cu52A0%3C%2Fbutton%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-rows%22%3E%24%7Be(t.Id).map(o%3D%3Ed(o%2C%22l2%22)).join(%22%22)%7C%7C'%3Cdiv%20style%3D%22padding%3A16px%3Bcolor%3A%23888%22%3E%5Cu672A%5Cu767B%5Cu9332%3C%2Fdiv%3E'%7D%3C%2Fdiv%3E%60%3A'%3Cdiv%20style%3D%22padding%3A16px%3Bcolor%3A%23888%22%3E%5Cu5DE6%5Cu3067%5Cu7B2C1%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%5Cu3092%5Cu9078%5Cu629E%5Cu3057%5Cu3066%5Cu304F%5Cu3060%5Cu3055%5Cu3044%3C%2Fdiv%3E'%7D%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%60%7Dc.innerHTML%3D%60%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cstyle%3E%24%7BJ%7D%3C%2Fstyle%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cheader%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cb%3Epermreg%20%5Cu30DE%5Cu30B9%5Cu30BF%5Cu7BA1%5Cu7406%3C%2Fb%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cinput%20type%3D%22text%22%20id%3D%22pr-weburl%22%20value%3D%22%24%7By(r.webUrl)%7D%22%20title%3D%22SharePoint%20%5Cu30B5%5Cu30A4%5Cu30C8URL%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cbutton%20class%3D%22pr-btn%22%20data-act%3D%22reload%22%3E%5Cu518D%5Cu8AAD%5Cu8FBC%3C%2Fbutton%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cbutton%20class%3D%22pr-btn%22%20data-act%3D%22close%22%3E%5Cu2715%3C%2Fbutton%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%3C%2Fheader%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-body%22%3E%24%7Ba%7D%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cfooter%3E%24%7Br.ready%3F%22%5Cu6E96%5Cu5099OK%22%3A%22%5Cu30DE%5Cu30B9%5Cu30BF%5Cu30EA%5Cu30B9%5Cu30C8%5Cu672A%5Cu4F5C%5Cu6210%22%7D%3C%2Ffooter%3E%60%7Dasync%20function%20m()%7Bawait%20G()%2Cr.ready%26%26await%20K()%2CU()%7Dc.addEventListener(%22change%22%2Ce%3D%3E%7Bconst%20t%3De.target%3Bif(t.id%3D%3D%3D%22pr-weburl%22)%7Br.webUrl%3Dt.value.trim()%2ClocalStorage.setItem(P%2Cr.webUrl)%2Cv%3Dnull%3Breturn%7Dif(t.dataset.act%3D%3D%3D%22active%22)%7Bconst%20a%3Dt.closest(%22.pr-row%22)%2Cd%3Da.dataset.kind%3D%3D%3D%22l1%22%3Fw%3Ap%3Bg(%22%5Cu66F4%5Cu65B0%22%2Casync()%3D%3E%7Bawait%20T(d%2C%2Ba.dataset.id%2C%7BActive%3At.checked%7D)%2Cawait%20m()%7D)%7D%7D)%2Cc.addEventListener(%22keydown%22%2Ce%3D%3E%7Be.key%3D%3D%3D%22Enter%22%26%26(e.target.id%3D%3D%3D%22pr-add-l1%22%26%26c.querySelector('%5Bdata-act%3D%22add-l1%22%5D').click()%2Ce.target.id%3D%3D%3D%22pr-add-l2%22%26%26c.querySelector('%5Bdata-act%3D%22add-l2%22%5D').click())%7D)%2Cc.addEventListener(%22click%22%2Ce%3D%3E%7Bconst%20t%3De.target.closest(%22%5Bdata-act%5D%22)%3Bif(!t)return%3Bconst%20a%3Dt.dataset.act%2Cd%3Dt.closest(%22.pr-row%22)%2Co%3Dd%26%26d.dataset.kind%2Cs%3Dd%26%26%2Bd.dataset.id%2Cb%3Do%3D%3D%3D%22l1%22%3Fw%3Ap%2Cx%3Do%3D%3D%3D%22l1%22%3Fr.l1%3Ar.l2.filter(n%3D%3En.Level1%26%26n.Level1.Id%3D%3D%3Dr.selectedL1)%2Cf%3Dx%26%26x.find(n%3D%3En.Id%3D%3D%3Ds)%3Bif(a%3D%3D%3D%22close%22)%7Bc.remove()%3Breturn%7Dif(a%3D%3D%3D%22reload%22)%7Bg(%22%5Cu518D%5Cu8AAD%5Cu8FBC%22%2Cm)%3Breturn%7Dif(a%3D%3D%3D%22setup%22)%7Bg(%22%5Cu30BB%5Cu30C3%5Cu30C8%5Cu30A2%5Cu30C3%5Cu30D7%22%2Casync()%3D%3E%7Bawait%20R(O)%2Cawait%20m()%7D)%3Breturn%7Dif(a%3D%3D%3D%22select%22)%7Br.selectedL1%3Ds%2CU()%3Breturn%7Dif(a%3D%3D%3D%22add-l1%22%7C%7Ca%3D%3D%3D%22add-l2%22)%7Bconst%20l%3Dc.querySelector(a%3D%3D%3D%22add-l1%22%3F%22%23pr-add-l1%22%3A%22%23pr-add-l2%22).value.trim()%3Bif(!l)return%3Bconst%20k%3Da%3D%3D%3D%22add-l1%22%3Fr.l1%3Ar.l2.filter(h%3D%3Eh.Level1%26%26h.Level1.Id%3D%3D%3Dr.selectedL1)%3Bif(k.some(h%3D%3Eh.Title%3D%3D%3Dl))%7Balert(%22%5Cu300C%22%2Bl%2B%22%5Cu300D%5Cu306F%5Cu65E2%5Cu306B%5Cu767B%5Cu9332%5Cu3055%5Cu308C%5Cu3066%5Cu3044%5Cu307E%5Cu3059%5Cu3002%22)%3Breturn%7Dg(%22%5Cu8FFD%5Cu52A0%22%2Casync()%3D%3E%7Bconst%20h%3D%7BTitle%3Al%2CSortOrder%3AN(k)%2CActive%3A!0%7D%3Ba%3D%3D%3D%22add-l2%22%26%26(h.Level1Id%3Dr.selectedL1)%2Cawait%20V(a%3D%3D%3D%22add-l1%22%3Fw%3Ap%2Ch)%2Cawait%20m()%7D)%3Breturn%7Dif(f)if(a%3D%3D%3D%22rename%22)%7Bconst%20n%3Dprompt(%22%5Cu65B0%5Cu3057%5Cu3044%5Cu540D%5Cu79F0%3A%22%2Cf.Title)%3Bif(!n%7C%7Cn.trim()%3D%3D%3Df.Title)return%3Bg(%22%5Cu540D%5Cu79F0%5Cu5909%5Cu66F4%22%2Casync()%3D%3E%7Bawait%20T(b%2Cs%2C%7BTitle%3An.trim()%7D)%2Cawait%20m()%7D)%7Delse%20if(a%3D%3D%3D%22del%22)%7Bif(o%3D%3D%3D%22l1%22)%7Bconst%20n%3Dr.l2.filter(l%3D%3El.Level1%26%26l.Level1.Id%3D%3D%3Ds)%3Bif(n.length)%7Balert(%22%5Cu300C%22%2Bf.Title%2B%22%5Cu300D%5Cu306B%5Cu306F%5Cu7B2C2%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%5Cu304C%20%22%2Bn.length%2B%22%20%5Cu4EF6%5Cu3042%5Cu308A%5Cu307E%5Cu3059%5Cu3002%5Cu5148%5Cu306B%5Cu7B2C2%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%5Cu3092%5Cu524A%5Cu9664%5Cu3057%5Cu3066%5Cu304F%5Cu3060%5Cu3055%5Cu3044%5Cu3002%22)%3Breturn%7D%7Dif(!confirm(%22%5Cu300C%22%2Bf.Title%2B%22%5Cu300D%5Cu3092%5Cu524A%5Cu9664%5Cu3057%5Cu307E%5Cu3059%5Cu304B%3F%22))return%3Bg(%22%5Cu524A%5Cu9664%22%2Casync()%3D%3E%7Bawait%20X(b%2Cs)%2Cawait%20m()%7D)%7Delse(a%3D%3D%3D%22up%22%7C%7Ca%3D%3D%3D%22down%22)%26%26g(%22%5Cu4E26%5Cu3079%5Cu66FF%5Cu3048%22%2Casync()%3D%3E%7Bawait%20B(b%2Cx%2Cf%2Ca%3D%3D%3D%22up%22%3F-1%3A1)%2Cawait%20m()%7D)%7D)%2CU()%2Cg(%22%5Cu8AAD%5Cu8FBC%22%2Cm)%7D)()%3B%0A
